revision.text: {{High-use}} == Usage == Implements [[Template:Tree chart]]; Full documentation on chart syntax exists at [[Template:Tree chart/doc]] This module uses the mw.html library to create rows of table cells whose borders draw lines to show relationships between elements. When an unnamed parameter matches a key in [[Module:Tree chart/data]], the module will create a block with stylings as defined in the table. Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] }}

{{High-use}} == Usage == Implements [[Template:Tree chart]]; Full documentation on chart syntax exists at [[Template:Tree chart/doc]] This module uses the mw.html library to create rows of table cells whose borders draw lines to show relationships between elements. When an unnamed parameter matches a key in [[Module:Tree chart/data]], the module will create a block with stylings as defined in the table. Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] }}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] }}

When an unnamed parameter matches a key in [[Module:Tree chart/data]], the module will create a block with stylings as defined in the table. Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] }}

When an unnamed parameter matches a key in [[Module:Tree chart/data]], the module will create a block with stylings as defined in the table. Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Undo revision [[Special:Diff/218837|218837]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])

When an unnamed parameter matches a key in [[Module:Tree chart/data]], the module will create a block with stylings as defined in the table. Each key in the table has a subtable with 0, 1, or 2 keys of its own: t for the "top" row and b for the "bottom row". Any unnamed parameter whose value does not exist in the table will be used to create elements on the chart, and additional named parameters for that value will be looked for. {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Graph, chart and plot templates]] }}
